title: Poincianella phyllanthoides
taxonomy: Poincianella phyllanthoides is a species within the family Fabaceae, which is commonly known as the legume family. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics, such as its fruit and flower structure. The genus Poincianella is part of the subfamily Faboideae. The family Fabaceae is further divided into several subfamilies, including the Faboideae, Caesalpinioideae, and Mimosoideae. Poincianella phyllanthoides is closely related to other legume species within the same subfamily.
